scripts.build: bun run clean && bun x tsc -noEmit -skipLibCheck && bun esbuild.config.ts production
scripts.test: bun run clean && bun x tsc src/sync-core.ts src/remote-paths.ts --target ES2020 --module ES2020 --moduleResolution node --outDir dist --skipLibCheck --ignoreConfig --ignoreDeprecations 6.0 && bun test/sync-core.test.mjs
